Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Temperance{f 0 1 27}: The next time you do a daily activity, your {f 4 30 0 1 0 0}, {f 4 30 2 1 0 0}, and {f 4 30 1 1 0 0} will increase more than usual for that day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Devil{f 0 1 27}: The number of items obtained by defeating enemies and destroying breakable objects will increase until you leave Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Tower{f 0 1 27}: All of your current Personas will have their stats increased by 1.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Star{f 0 1 27}: You will be able to pick one additional card during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Moon{f 0 1 27}: All current party members will have their HP and SP fully restored.[n]{f 1 1}
